languages.text: Колония испытывает нехватку провизии, тела умерших от голода таинственно исчезают прежде, чем их успевают утилизировать.

traits.locale_text: Колония испытывает нехватку провизии, тела умерших от голода таинственно исчезают прежде, чем их успевают утилизировать.
Колония испытывает нехватку провизии, тела умерших от голода таинственно исчезают прежде, чем их успевают утилизировать.

languages.text: The colony has exhausted their supply of food, bodies of the starved mysteriously disappear before officials have a chance to remove them.
languages.original_text: Колония испытывает нехватку провизии, тела умерших от голода таинственно исчезают прежде, чем их успевают утилизировать.

traits.locale_text: The colonists starve. Bodies in the street mysteriously disappear before officials have a chance to remove them.
The colonists starve. Bodies in the street mysteriously disappear before officials have a chance to remove them.
The colony has exhausted their supply of food, bodies of the starved mysteriously disappear before officials have a chance to remove them.
The colony has exhausted their supply of food, bodies of the starved mysteriously disappear before officials have a chance to remove them.
The colony has exhausted their supply of food, bodies of the starved mysteriously disappear before officials have a chance to remove them.
The colony has exhausted their supply of food, bodies of the starved mysteriously disappear before officials have a chance to remove them.

languages.text: Die Kolonie hat ihre Nahrungsvorräte aufgebraucht, und die Leichen der Verhungerten verschwinden auf mysteriöse Weise, bevor die Beamten sie entfernen können.
languages.original_text: The colony has exhausted their supply of food, bodies of the starved mysteriously disappear before officials have a chance to remove them.

traits.locale_text: Die Kolonie hat ihre Nahrungsvorräte aufgebraucht, und die Leichen der Verhungerten verschwinden auf mysteriöse Weise, bevor die Beamten sie entfernen können.

languages.text: La colonie ayant épuisé ses réserves de nourriture, les corps des personnes affamées disparaissent mystérieusement avant que les autorités n'aient eu le temps de les retirer.
languages.original_text: The colony has exhausted their supply of food, bodies of the starved mysteriously disappear before officials have a chance to remove them.

traits.locale_text: La colonie ayant épuisé ses réserves de nourriture, les corps des personnes affamées disparaissent mystérieusement avant que les autorités n'aient eu le temps de les retirer.

languages.text: La colonia ha agotado sus reservas de alimentos, los cuerpos de los hambrientos desaparecen misteriosamente antes de que los funcionarios tengan la oportunidad de retirarlos.
languages.original_text: The colony has exhausted their supply of food, bodies of the starved mysteriously disappear before officials have a chance to remove them.

traits.locale_text: La colonia ha agotado sus reservas de alimentos, los cuerpos de los hambrientos desaparecen misteriosamente antes de que los funcionarios tengan la oportunidad de retirarlos.

languages.text: Koloninin yiyecek stoku tükendi, açlıktan ölenlerin cesetleri yetkililer onları çıkarmaya fırsat bulamadan gizemli bir şekilde ortadan kayboldu.
languages.original_text: The colony has exhausted their supply of food, bodies of the starved mysteriously disappear before officials have a chance to remove them.

traits.locale_text: Koloninin yiyecek stoku tükendi, açlıktan ölenlerin cesetleri yetkililer onları çıkarmaya fırsat bulamadan gizemli bir şekilde ortadan kayboldu.
